creator: slasiewski@lbl.gov
text:
I am reading the article "Mirroring FreeBSD: How to Mirror FreeBSD" [1] so that I may mirror the FreeBSD repositories. In several places, that article recommends using CVSup in several sections.

However, CVSup has been deprecated [2].

Please remove mention of CVSup from the article.


[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/hubs/article.html#mirror-howto
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/cvsup.html

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: n/a
